dialogos.texto_en: Uesugi-kun.
Uesugi-kun, wake up.
...Huh?
Gooood morniiing!
Looking at you made me sleepy too, Futaro-kun.
You'll catch a cold.
Don't sleep in a place like that.\nWake up now.
Huh...? The wedding...
Huh?
Are you still half-asleep?
You're quite hasty.
Ah, no, it's like I had a weird dream\nor something...
It's unusual for you to say something like that,\nand sleep in a place like this.
Everyone has decided on their path,\nso maybe you're just tired?
Y-yeah...
The wedding...?
Are you half-asleep?
You're a little hasty.
Ah, no, it's like I had a weird dream\nor something...
It's unusual for you to say something like that,\nand sleep in a place like this.
Everyone has decided on their path,\nso maybe you're just tired?
Y-yeah...
Huh?!\nWhat are you saying?!
...Y-you're being hasty.
That's right.
Ah, no, it's like I had a weird dream\nor something...
It's unusual for you to say something like that,\nand sleep in a place like this.
Everyone has decided on their path,\nso maybe you're just tired?
Y-yeah...
Huh? WHAT?!
WHAAAT?!
Don't be so hasty.
Ah, no, it's like I had a weird dream\nor something...
It's unusual for you to say something like that,\nand sleep in a place like this.
Everyone has decided on their path,\nso maybe you're just tired?
Y-yeah...
Huh? A wedding?
Wh-what are you saying, all of a sudden?!
This is sleepwalking, right?
Ah, no, it's like I had a weird dream\nor something...
It's unusual for you to say something like that,\nespecially when you're sleeping in a place like this.
Everyone has decided on their path,\nso maybe you're just tired?
Y-yeah...
Wait a minute.\nIt hasn't even been decided if you can graduate yet,\nright?
Ahaha, that's right.
If you pass the exam after the graduation ceremony,\nthen we're fine, right?
Yeah. I was on a leave of absence, but it \nwas a special situation and I could retake the test.\nThe school was considerate in many ways.
But if you fail, you'll end up doing nothing for a year.\nBe aware that the situation is unpredictable.
I get it, I get it.
I want to graduate with everyone, but most of all,\nI want to graduate with you.\nWatch me give it my all.
I see.\nThe power of love is truly great, isn't it.
Th-that's not really relevant.\nI just want you to always do your best...
With Uesugi-san by your side, you'll be okay!\nI was able to get into university too, thanks to him.
Itsuki also got into the school she wanted.
Yes. I've come one step closer to my dream\nof becoming a teacher, thanks to Uesugi-kun.
I finally got this chance and\nI'm going to do my best to graduate with everyone.
With Uesugi-san by your side, you'll be okay!\nI was able to get into university too, thanks to him.
Itsuki also got into the school she wanted.
Yes. I've come one step closer to my dream\nof becoming a teacher, thanks to Uesugi-kun.
Well, it was really tough, but...
It's the result of your continuous efforts and hard work. \nBe proud of yourselves.
Alright!
Thank you very much.
Nino and Miku, you'll be attending\nculinary school together in spring, right?
That's right. I'm sorry\nI won't be going to university with you guys.
Don't worry about it.\nUniversity isn't the only path to take.\nRight, Ichika?
That's right.\nAfter graduating from high school,\nI plan to pursue my dream of becoming an actress.
Feels like you're already doing it, though.
That's true.
However, it's hard to believe you're saying\nthat university isn't the only path,\ngiven the person I met back then.
Ah, right...
For you, Uesugi-san, going to university in Tokyo\nwas the best path, wasn't it!
Tokyo, huh. As we talk about it like this,\nI feel like we're about to start a new life soon.
I wonder how things will turn out.\nI can't imagine how it'll be.
While we're all here together, Uesugi-san...
(That's right. I won't be able to spend time\n with these guys like I used to.)
That's why I was so happy.\nWhen you suggested a graduation trip, Futaro.
I can't imagine you saying,\n'Let's make our last high school memories memorable.'
Y-yeah, I guess.
(Making our last high school memories.\n That's certainly true, but more than anything,\n I'm going on this trip to show her%p-2;――%p;)
(The kind of man I really am!!)
(I see. Maybe the reason I had that dream\n about a wedding earlier\n was because of my determination.)
(After all, I'm going on this trip with her...!)
Uesugi-kun?\nIs something bothering you all of a sudden?
Huh?!\nN-n-no, it's nothing!
Anyway, let's decide where to go!\nIsn't that why we all gathered here today?
You say that,\nbut I wonder who was asleep until just now.
Well, this is a tough decision.\nMaybe we should consider going overseas.
No way!
Huh? Why?
Travel expenses, of course.\nDon't compare me to you guys,\nwe're going somewhere nearby!
We'll cover the travel expenses.
What? Wait, wait a minute.\nThat's just too much...
Don't worry,\nwe're not planning on treating you.\nConsider it an investment in our future success.
*sigh*\nWell, if that's the case.
Then where should we go?\nSince this is going to be our last high school trip,\nlet's go as far away as possible!
Nearby should be fine.
Huh?\nCome on, we're making memories, so let's just\nup and head somewhere.
Up and head...somewhere?\nIs that what traveling is all about?
Well, it doesn't necessarily mean going all out, but\nnow that exams are over and we're free from everything,\nwe should have the time of our lives!
Hey, Futaro-kun!\nDon't you think treating yourself is a good idea too?
I don't really get the concept\nof treating yourself though.
Oh, my?
Oh well, if it's more fun for you guys,\nthen I'll go along with it.
Yay! You understand us so well, Futaro-kun.
So, how about us five pointing to a place together?
Where's my say?
Well, we already know the result.
Yeah, since we're going anyway.
Right!\nAlright, so are we really gonna go overseas here?
Oh?\nLooks like you've gained some confidence\nin your language skills.
What?
In that case, I'll have you show me them!\nHow about a vacation with no interpreter?!
That's impossible. Let's just stay in Japan.
So, how about us five pointing to a place together?
Where's my say?
Well, we already know the result.
For example, where do you suggest?
Let's see...\nFor example...
Anywhere is fine if you're with us, Futaro.
...Uh, well, that's not really an answer.
Nino.
Hey now.\nDon't just run off with her alone.
So, how about us five pointing to a place together?
Where's my say?
Well, we already know the result.
Anywhere is fine if you're with us, Fu-kun.
Well, that's not really an answer.\nIn that case, let's go somewhere nearby.
...Yeah, yeah.\nYour response is as expected.
So, how about us five pointing to a place together?
Where's my say?
Well, we already know the result.
I think so too.
Alright, let's do this on three!
One, two, THREE! Here!
...Look, see?
Ahaha.\nAs expected, we all pointed to different places.
*sigh*\nQuintuplets are so troublesome...
Still, the food in Hokkaido is so tempting, isn't it?
But isn't it still cold there?\nAnd there might be a lot of snow.
Yeah, that's true, isn't it.
Snow, eh.\nMaybe it'd be nice to go spring skiing.
In that case, how about Nagano?\nWe can also enjoy hot springs on the side.
Niigata is also a possibility.
But skiing doesn't really feel\nlike a graduation trip, does it?
Yeah, that's true.
In that case%p-2;――
Enough already!
WAAAH!\nWhat's the matter, Uesugi-san?
Don't give me that 'what's the matter' crap!\nHow long are we going to argue?\nIt's been an hour already!
But, you know, since it's a rare opportunity,\nwe want to choose a place that we can all agree on.
At this rate, we'll never decide!\nAlright, just let me decide!
Well, to be honest,\nI don't really have a place in mind either...
It seems best to have Futaro decide, here.
Leave it to me.\nI've heard all of your wishes,\nso I'll show us a place that satisfies all of them!
And, that is...
That is?
Okinawa!
Okinawa?
Okinawa at this time of the year\nshould have nice weather that's not too hot or too cold\nand we should be able to relax.
I see.
Of course, the beauty of the sea goes without saying,\nand there are plenty of activities\nsuch as marine sports!
That's right!
Not only the sea,\nbut we can also enjoy the unique beauty of nature!
Yes, that's true.
There are also many famous power spots!
That's certainly true.
With a wealth of ingredients represented by seafood,\nwe can enjoy cuisine that makes the most of them!
Oh...I see!
How about it?\nIs there a better place than this?
No, it's amazing!
This is definitely it.
As expected of Uesugi-san!
We should have had you decide from the beginning.
If we did,\nwe would have ended up with a place really close.
...Well, I won't deny that.
